lever: Reuse Eigh/Jacobi decomposition scratch buffers across batched matrices instead of allocating eigenvalue, eigenvector, index, and sorted-output buffers per slice.

baseline.source: same-turn focused RCH criterion baseline before editing
baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 --noplot --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 --noplot --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

alien_inputs: arena/slab reuse: move fixed-size matrix decomposition scratch allocation out of the hot batched Eigh slice loop
preserve the existing numerical algorithm and operation order while reducing allocator traffic

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Batch slice order, Jacobi p/q pivot scan, row update loops, eigenvector update loops, eigenvalue sorting, and output append order execute unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Eigenvalue sorting remains indices.sort_by with f64::total_cmp on computed eigenvalues.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each matrix row element, eigenvector element, and eigenvalue is computed by the same sin_cos and multiply/add/sub expressions in the same order; only Vec allocation lifetime changes.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: Input validation, shape/rank errors, non-square errors, batch fallback, and nonleading batch movement are unchanged.

validation.result: 255 unit tests passed; 55 integration tests passed; dispatch_baseline bench harness smoke passed

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 0; 0 critical findings; existing file-wide warning inventory remains
